name: stop-motion-dev-kit
description: Plan stop-motion: Stop Motion Studio and/or Cloud Stop Motion (Chromebook cloud)

steps.text: Studio: https://www.stopmotionstudio.com/download/index.html — Cloud/Chromebook: https://cloudstopmotion.com/ + https://app.cloudstopmotion.com — skill stop-motion-dev-kit. Official products only. User HITL. No Fable auto-upload. Large exports local/gitignored.

steps.prompt: Using skill stop-motion-dev-kit and knowledge/media/stop-motion-studio.md + knowledge/media/cloud-stop-motion.md, produce sm-plan: (1) verdict (2) tool-choose — Cloud Stop Motion if Chromebook/browser/classroom cloud; Stop Motion Studio if native offline/DSLR-heavy (3) download-install or chromebook-setup with official URLs (4) project-scaffold (include 02_cloud_exports/ when cloud) (5) set-rig (6) fps-recipe ~6 start / 12+ smoother (7) capture-lab matching tool (8) if Cloud: cloud-upload + optional school-org-export (9) if Studio: camera-setup/export-package/project-transfer (10) publish-handoff HITL (11) vs-cloud / vs-krita as needed (12) OPEN VERIFY LIVE. Ask if unclear: Chromebook vs desktop; school vs home; first short vs multi-shot. Not legal advice. User operates apps HITL.
